The '''bog moon of Bogden'''<ref name="Gir Kybo Ren-Cha Databank entry">{{DB|character|kyboren|Ren-Cha, Gir Kybo}}</ref> was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]]. It was used as a hideout by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Gir Kybo Ren-Cha]] after he made his escape from [[Tammuz-an/Legends|Tammuz-an]], bringing along [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Gerin Toda]] as a hostage. It was on the bog moon that he was recaptured in a skirmish between his gang and the [[Tammuz-an (species)/Legends|Tammuz-an]] warriors led by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Malameu Toda]] and [[King/Legends|King]] [[Mon Julpa]].<ref name="The Revenge of Kybo Ren" />

{{Moon-stub}}
